files.docs/specs/DEVSESSION_FORMAT.md:
# DevSession Format
The .devsession file tracks conversation spans, checkpoints, and summary state for DevSession runtime files like packages/reccli-core/reccli/devsession.py and packages/reccli-core/reccli/checkpoints.py.
files.docs/specs/DEVPROJECT_FORMAT.md:
# DevProject Format
The .devproject file tracks features, proposals, and canonical project state for packages/reccli-core/reccli/devproject.py and packages/reccli-core/reccli/proposal_queue.py.
files.PROJECT_PLAN.md:
# Project Plan
The Python Backend Server feature includes license validation in packages/reccli-core/backend/server.py.
files.docs/architecture/OVERVIEW.md:
# Architecture Overview
RecCli combines session memory, project tracking, and retrieval systems across the whole repository.
